SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into as of the 15th day of November, 2023 by and between:

1. Dr. Jonathan Tan, NRIC: S7654321D, residing at 123 Orchard Road, #15-01, Singapore 238851, Contact: +65 9123 4567, Email: jtan@syntheticmail.sg

2. Ms. Chloe Lim, NRIC: S8765432H, residing at 456 Bukit Timah Road, #09-03, Singapore 259777, Contact: +65 9876 5432, Email: clim@syntheticmail.sg

3. Widget Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN: 198765432H, having its registered office at 789 Raffles Place, #21-01, Singapore 048623, Contact: +65 6234 5678

WHEREAS the parties have agreed to enter into a joint venture for the sum of SGD 1,500,000 to develop innovative technologies;

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
